message.content:
@startuml
actor "User Agent" as UA
participant "Content Upload API" as API
database "Content database" as DB
participant "CAFF Parser" as CP

UA -> API : Upload request (HTTP POST),\ncontains a single CAFF file in its body.

note right of API
**MUST** also include a CSRF token to prevent users of other,
potentially XSS vulnerable sites to take part in a massive distributed spam or DoS operation.
end note

API -> CP : Validate upload request
CP --> API : Return result

alt [Failed to validate uploaded content]
    note right of DB
    Uploads should be validated by at **LEAST**:
    * Content-Size header against max file size.
    * All size fields against their respective supported bounds.
    * Structure of all fields match expectations from the spec.
    * Number of bytes from the upload matches number of bytes expected from in-file metadata.
    end note
    API --> UA : Return an HTTP status code that signals validation failure.\nExact value depends on how the validation failed.

else [Request is deemed valid]
    API -> DB : Store content in database
    DB --> API : Return result of request

    alt [Upload succeeded]
        API --> UA : Return HTTP 201 Created
    else
        API --> UA : Return HTTP status code signaling the reason for failure.
    end
end

@enduml
